info.title: HistoryTalk API
info.description: Vietnamese history educational AI platform — backend REST API

post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair
Sign in or register via Google OAuth ID token
Send a password-reset link to the given email

200.description: Reset email sent (same response whether email exists or not)

post.summary: Reset password using the token from the email link
Attach a character to a historical context

delete.summary: Remove a character from a historical context

get.summary: Get all contexts of a character

post.summary: Create a new chat session (also returns AI greeting)

get.summary: Get session info and all messages

post.summary: Send a message (Java-style — sessionId in body)
post.description:
Primary chat endpoint. Send a message and receive an AI response.
The sessionId is passed in the request body (same as Java BE).

post.summary: Send a message and stream the response (SSE)
post.description: Streaming chat endpoint mimicking ChatGPT behavior.

200.description: SSE stream of the AI response

post.summary: Send a message (Legacy — sessionId in path)
Upload a document for a Historical Context (Staff/Admin only)

201.description: Document created and queued for AI processing

delete.summary: Delete a document (also removes from AI vector store)

post.summary: Upload a document for a Character (Staff/Admin only)

201.description: Document created and queued for AI processing

get.summary: Get a character document by ID

delete.summary: Delete a character document (also removes from AI vector store)

200.description: Historical context active status toggled successfully

post.description: Called by PayOS after a payment event. Not authenticated — trust is established by verifying the HMAC-SHA256 signature in the body.

post.summary: Create a payment order and PayOS checkout link

get.summary: Get order status (lazily reconciles with PayOS)
Get one of the current user's completed quiz sessions

parameters.name: limitedTime
parameters.description: Optional session time limit in seconds

get.summary: Get quiz detail with all questions
Get a subscription tier by ID

400.description: Passwords do not match or incorrect current password

get.summary: Get a user by ID (SystemAdmin only)

tags.description: Documents attached to a Historical Context (for RAG)
